docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED APR-20-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENEDIX, SEAN
SC-220 REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BENEDIX, SEAN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BENEDIX, SEAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2023 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TIME PAYMENTS (SC-222).THE REQUEST IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS:PAYMENTS OF $100.00 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE: OCT-15-2023 UNTIL: DEC-15-2032. THE AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $100.00. IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY NOTIFY THE COURT TO CANCEL THE PAYMENT PLAN AND THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE AND COLLECTIBLE.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY LEE, HIRAM BENEDIX, SEAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, HIRAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENEDIX, SEAN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, HIRAM AS TO DEFENDANT BENEDIX, SEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S (SC-221) RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S (SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (REQUEST & RESPONSE FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HIRAM
DECLARATION CHANGE OF ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BENEDIX, SEAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF HIRAM LEE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS KRISS MIRANDA (PROPERTY AGENT). DEFENDANT SEAN BENEDIX IS PRESENT. CASE WAS HEARD TOGETHER WITH CSM-23-866762 (LEE V. MARTINEZ) AS CLAIM IS RELATED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
